name: wake
description: Wake monorepo: PWA, creator dashboard, landing

scripts.build:web: npm run export:web --prefix apps/pwa && node scripts/inject-expo-script.js
scripts.build:pwa: node apps/pwa/scripts/bundle-cities.js && cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/app npm run export:web --prefix apps/pwa && node scripts/inject-expo-script.js && node scripts/rewrite-pwa-paths.js && node scripts/copy-pwa-public.js
scripts.build:creator: npm run build --prefix apps/creator-dashboard
scripts.build:pwa:staging: node apps/pwa/scripts/bundle-cities.js && cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_ENV=staging EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/app npm run export:web --prefix apps/pwa && node scripts/inject-expo-script.js && node scripts/rewrite-pwa-paths.js && node scripts/copy-pwa-public.js
scripts.build:creator:staging: cross-env VITE_FIREBASE_ENV=staging npm run build --prefix apps/creator-dashboard
scripts.build:landing:staging: cross-env VITE_FIREBASE_ENV=staging npm run build --prefix apps/landing
scripts.build:all: npm run build:landing && npm run build:pwa && npm run build:creator && npm run build:devportal && node scripts/assemble-hosting.js
scripts.build:all:staging: npm run build:landing:staging && npm run build:pwa:staging && npm run build:creator:staging && npm run build:devportal && node scripts/assemble-hosting.js
scripts.setup:firebase: echo 'Please configure Firebase manually using the documentation'
scripts.creator:dev: npm --prefix functions run build && concurrently -n tsc,emu,vite -c blue,magenta,green "npm --prefix functions run build:watch" "firebase emulators:start --only functions --project wake-staging" "cross-env VITE_FIREBASE_ENV=staging npm run dev --prefix apps/creator-dashboard"
